docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-02-2020, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HOUSTON, RYAN GEICO

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF DINO BAELLO IS PRESENT AND IS ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED AMERICAN SIGN LANGUAGE INTERPRETER #40022. DEFENDANT RYAN HOUSTON IS NOT PRESENT. THE ISSUE RE: CERTIFIED MAIL SERVICE IS ADDRESSED BY THE COURT RE: THE RETURN MAIL OF DEFENDANT'S CLAIM ON JULY 21, 2020 TO THE COURT AND THE SIGNED CERTIFIED RETURN RECEIPT FILED ON JULY 8, 2020 ARE REVIEWED BY COURT. ITS IS DETERMINED THAT THE SIGNED RECEIPT IS VALID FOR SERVICE. FILED PROOF OF SERVICE OF 7-21-20 IS VALIDATED IN ROA. PLAINTIFF STATES HE HAS RECEIVED PAYMENTS FROM GEICO, BUT THEY HAVE NOT BEEN CASHED. UPON REVIEW OF THE SUBMITTED DOCUMENTS, THE COURT SUGGEST TO PLAINTIFF HE SHOULD CONTACT GEICO TO GET CLARIFICATION OF THE SUBMITTED PAYMENT TO PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF AGREES TO DISMISS THE MATTER WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAELLO, DINO AS TO DEFENDANT HOUSTON, RYAN GEICO
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BAELLO, DINO AS TO DEFENDANT HOUSTON, RYAN GEICO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-04-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 09/04/20. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF BAELLO, DINO

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD." - RETURN RECEIPT RETURNED TO COURT ON 07/06/20 WITHOUT ENVELOPE. COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HOUSTON, RYAN GEICO
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER AGREEMENT OF PLAINTIFF.
